mapper.select: SELECT supplier_id, supplier_name, phone, email, address, created_at, updated_at FROM suppliers
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_name, phone, email, address) VALUES (#{supplierName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE suppliers SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
